name: thredUP Inc.
description: thredUP Inc. is a prominent American online resale platform specializing in the sale of secondhand clothing, footwear, and accessories. Founded in 2009 and headquartered in Oakland, California, the company leverages technology to make buying and selling used apparel easy and accessible. By operating a large-scale marketplace, thredUP aims to inspire consumers to think secondhand first, promoting a more sustainable fashion ecosystem. The company serves as a leading destination for circular fashion, connecting millions of buyers and sellers through its efficient logistics network and user-friendly digital platform.
